case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. YASMIN TATIANA VANEGAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT YASMIN TATIANA VANEGAS DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANEGAS, YASMIN TATIANA $1,256.87 PRINCIPAL, $43.39 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,385.26 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VANEGAS, YASMIN TATIANA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,316.87 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VANEGAS, YASMIN TATIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED SEP-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VANEGAS, YASMIN TATIANA
